events.text:
The scenario describes a field method for conductor selection & sizing that is less tidy than preferred shop approach but matches listed product instructions and project requirements. No local amendment forbids it. Reference material: NEC 310, Table 310.16.

This is a pass situation - the work matches product instructions and project requirements, no code amendment forbids it. The field method is just less tidy butstill compliant.
